历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 875 → 760 → 3342 → 694 → 691. In 2023, an abnormal ranking occurred due to a special enrollment project. Excluding that, the rankings have stabilized around 690 in recent years, with a baseline of about 691 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category was 43 in 2021 → 4 in 2022 (data anomaly) → 37 in 2023 → 35 in 2024 → 27 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 50, an increase of about 85% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, sharing the reputation of the Harbin Institute of Technology C9 League. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 12th, with stable or rising rankings in recent years, making it a top national engineering institution. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. It ranks 10th in total on Douyin (high heat), with high short video exposure and increasing attention from applicants. Historical admission anomaly signals are low attention, with no record of gaps. Relying on HIT's main campus discipline evaluations: Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Mechanics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, and 17 other A-/A/A+ disciplines. The Shenzhen campus shares faculty and research platforms, with extremely strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended, with sustained high social application heat. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, a slight increase from about 297,000 in 2025 (Physics + History categories), slightly intensifying competition. The main campus is located in Shenzhen, Guangdong, in the core city of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, which has strong regional appeal for candidates from southwestern regions. The university's enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 1.5%, which is a normal proportion for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 691, the significant expansion of about 85% in 2026 will shift the ranking backward (increase in number), but factors such as the top-tier school level, high heat of popular engineering majors, Shenzhen's regional appeal, and a slight increase in total candidates partially offset the expansion effect. The expected minimum ranking is about 1000, with a range of 886–1114.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (886–1114), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on sprinting for Tier 1's Future Information direction (Computer Science). If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, lean towards Tier 3's Future Intelligent Manufacturing direction. The university's significant expansion in 2026 increases application opportunities, but competition for popular majors remains intense.
